Title: Celestial Constellation Pattern Stickers - Minimalist Space Boho Design
Description:
Celebrate the magic of the night sky with this delicate celestial pattern. Featuring stylized moons, stars, planets, and cosmic elements in a muted, earthy palette, these stickers bring a dreamy, bohemian touch to any surface.

  • Versatile Decor: Perfect for decorating planners, journals, scrapbooks, water bottles, laptops, or any surface needing a touch of cosmic charm.
  • Aesthetic Appeal: The minimalist, boho design complements various themes, from witchy academia to gentle nursery decor.
  • Easy Application: High-quality vinyl ensures easy peeling and smooth application, making decorating a breeze.
  • Durable & Fade-Resistant: Designed to withstand daily wear and tear, keeping your decorations looking fresh and vibrant.

Whether you are planning a journal spread, decorating a themed party favor, or simply adding some stellar vibes to your personal items, this sticker set is your perfect cosmic companion. It makes a thoughtful and beautiful gift for any stargazer or bohemian soul.
